name: Handala Hack (Void Manticore / Red Sandstorm / Banished Kitten)
aka: Void Manticore, Red Sandstorm, Banished Kitten, Karma, Homeland Justice
description:
MOIS-affiliated APT operating multiple personas: Handala Hack, Karma, Homeland Justice.

Key insight: MOIS actors actively leveraging cyber crime ecosystem — not just imitating it.
- Void Manticore uses Rhadamanthys infostealer (commercial malware)
- Qilin ransomware used in Israeli hospital attack (Shamir Medical Center) as cover for MOIS operation
- MuddyWater overlaps with Tsundere/DinDoor botnet and CastleLoader via shared code-signing certs

MOIS/crime nexus: Criminal tools provide operational capability + deniability + obfuscation.

name: Iran MOIS
description:
Iran Ministry of Intelligence and Security. 
Linked to Handala Hack and Homeland Justice groups. Uses Telegram as C2 for malware campaigns.
DOJ confirmed (March 2026): Handala behind Stryker attack - weaponized Microsoft Intune MDM to wipe 1000s of devices.
Attack disrupted manufacturing, ordering, shipping operations.
Hospitals in Maryland disconnected systems preventatively.
Domains seized by DOJ court order.
